last_ledger_base_fee.description: The base fee as defined in the last ledger.

ledger_capacity_usage.description: The average capacity usage over the last 5 ledgers (0 is no usage, 1.0 is completely full ledgers).

allOf.description: Information about the fee charged for transactions in the last 5 ledgers.
Information about max fee bid for transactions over the last 5 ledgers.
